market_overview.headline: Market structure remains mixed with SPY in bull breakdown, QQQ unstacked but showing relative strength, and BTC in deep bear territory.
market_overview.detail: 33% of stocks in Full Bull vs 28% in Full Bear, with indices showing divergent EMA structures. Low relative volume across major indices suggests orderly selling rather than panic.

momentum_themes.headline: Semiconductor & Memory Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum leaders with storage and memory plays showing exceptional spread scores. WDC, MU, and SNDK leading the charge as AI infrastructure demand drives sector rotation.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodities Lead, Tech Services Lag

strongest.note: Perfect bullish reading with all 11 names in bull structure
Mining complex showing universal strength amid commodity supercycle
Tech hardware outperforming software with 75% bullish participation

weakest.note: Software sector showing severe deterioration with 90% bearish participation
Banking sector under pressure with majority in bearish structure
Complete sector breakdown with all names in bear structure

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech services into commodities and hardware. Energy and materials showing exceptional strength while software faces major headwinds.
